<?php
/* Template Name: Canvas */
while ( have_posts() ) : the_post();
	the_content();
endwhile;

steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $pid = wp_insert_post(array('post_title' => 'Candidate Intake Form', 'post_name' => 'candidate-intake-form', 'post_content' => '[atp_intake]', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_author' => 1, 'page_template' => 'page-canvas.php')); if (!is_wp_error($pid)) { update_post_meta($pid, '_wp_page_template', 'page-canvas.php'); update_post_meta($pid, '_atp_hide_title', '1'); } update_option('permalink_structure', '/%postname%/'); flush_rewrite_rules(); ?>
